{"rule":"EN_WORD_COHERENCY","sentence":"^\\QAs noted in the same research \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, %\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q of respondents mentioned that non-governmental organizations are more likely to show a positive attitude to transgender people as well as the LGBT community.\\E$"}
